g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with follow-up GetDeployment calls until the lifecycle is DELETED or the resource is not found.
remove the finalizer after delete confirmation
Move the deployment compartment before reconciling route or tag drift.
Compare routes semantically before deciding whether to call UpdateDeployment.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
- Route collection equivalence is part of the modeled ready path, but the
current formal state partition does not expose OCI DELETING as
- Code and tests treat OCI DELETING as requeueing even though spec.cfg
only names CREATING and UPDATING as retryable.
- Matching route collections must skip no-op writes.
